customInstructions: This is the official Previous Year Paper (PYP) of HP Patwari held on 17 Nov 2019.
Total Questions: 100, Total Marks: 100, Total Time: 90 Minutes.
There was NO negative marking in this exam format.
Questions are available exactly as they appeared in the original examination.
